text: I believe in my abilities and trust myself.
I am capable of overcoming every challenge.
I am safe, calm, and in control.
One breath at a time, I find peace.
I give myself permission to rest.
Every day I become a better version of myself.
Small steps lead to great achievements.
Today is a beautiful opportunity to grow.
I am thankful for everything I have learned.
Every moment gives me something to appreciate.
I choose to focus on what truly matters.
I release worries that I cannot control.
Every experience helps me become stronger.
